news.t: Hartford Funds Expands Active Fixed Income Suite with the Launch of the Hartford Dynamic Bond ETF (DYNB)

overview.description: The Hartford Dynamic Bond ETF (DYNB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund aiming to provide long-term total return by tactically investing in fixed income securities globally. The fund has no limitations in terms of security type, maturity, or credit in seeking perceived opportunities DYNB was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by The Hartford.

data.title: Hartford Funds Expands Active Fixed Income Suite with the Launch of the Hartford Dynamic Bond ETF (DYNB)
data.text: WAYNE, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hartford Funds, a leading asset manager, today announced the launch of the Hartford Dynamic Bond ETF (Nasdaq: DYNB), an actively managed multisector bond strategy. The ETF...
